uncertainties.read: TRANSPOSED Schedule B grid ('Areco Schedule B', continuation of p.122): each COLUMN is one transaction (10 columns). Row-label column (Amount A-L / Type / Capital Gain / Date) is off-page on p.122; amount matrix and Capital Gain rows are unlabeled and degraded (X marks are dark bars), so amount=null and cap_gain_over_200=null for every tx. EIF marker on cols 1-4 (BLACKROCK/MCSXX). owner/asset/ticker/tx_type/date captured; dates are the bottom row.
uncertainties.note: use the p.122 'Areco Schedule B' A-L bucket/Type/Capital-Gain label key to resolve amounts by row position
